title: Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Gaurs Group Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Gaurs Group Advisory Limited:
Gaurs Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group Advisory Limited!
